payload.answer: Recorded two durable architecture/role principles (Brain DB as source of truth; Slack as strict memory intake). Preserved open questions about adding Telegram and choosing the cheapest saturating model as non-asserted ambiguity.
payload.decision: Record high-level system architecture principles as durable memory; preserve open questions as non-durable/ambiguous (not asserted as facts).

Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
